title: Fresh Skybox
description: Better Day, Night, Sunrise, Sunset skies! Coming soon: falling stars, meteors and more events! [Day Night Cycle]
body: Better Day, Night, Sunrise, Sunset sky textures! Coming soon: falling stars, meteors, rainbows, night nebulae, aurora borealis and more events! Looks much better in game!-you can't even see the stars in these gifs :( ![Sunset + Rain end](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f79bce9143a2270bdf1640b7c520b8b715fb889d.gif) ![Sunrise](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e908fec8fc7b5b614d3a8ff652c00c5a1d5c08dd.gif)
